name: Severn Trent plc
description: Severn Trent plc is a prominent water utility company headquartered in Coventry, England. It provides essential water and wastewater services to approximately 4.6 million households and businesses across the Midlands, South West, and Wales. As a constituent of the FTSE 100 Index and listed on the London Stock Exchange, the company focuses on delivering sustainable services while investing in innovation and environmental stewardship. Through its various subsidiaries, including Severn Trent Water and Hafren Dyfrdwy, the group remains committed to managing water resources efficiently and supporting the communities it serves.
